name: POST /api/v1/account/user/ - success returns 201 with user and tokens
description:
Purpose: Verify that a confirmed verification_token returns 201 with user info and JWT tokens.
        Flow:
          1. POST /auth/verification/        → verification_token
          2. POST /auth/verification/verify/ → OTP tasdiqlash  ← bu qadam muhim!
          3. POST /account/user/             → 201 + user + tokens
descriptionHtml:
Purpose: Verify that a confirmed verification_token returns 201 with user info and JWT tokens.
    Flow:
      1. POST /auth/verification/        → verification_token
      2. POST /auth/verification/verify/ → OTP tasdiqlash  ← bu qadam muhim!
      3. POST /account/user/             → 201 + user + tokens
statusTrace:
tests/account/user/test_create.py:78: in test_create_user_success
    assert response.status_code == 201, \
E   AssertionError: Expected: 201, Got: 400 | {"message":"The verification action does not match.","message_key":"verification_action_mismatch","errors":{},"exception_class":"InvalidDataException"}
E   assert 400 == 201
E    +  where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
